caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the words "BOSS TALK" in gold, and headphones is seated at a desk in a studio. He is speaking and gesturing with his right arm raised, which moves slightly between the frames. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him, and a black speaker is on the desk to his left. A white backdrop behind him features yellow stars and the text "HUSTLE" and "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right, a black mug with red and white text including "TALK OUT" is visible. A logo in the bottom left corner reads "BOSS TALK". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, continuing his expression and gesture as he talks.
